TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Charlie Beasley nalecuhan i Shawnee, Oklahoma, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Charlie Beasley i 1967 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 7 ku uwac atu silsil 74, namapili' tu nu Cincinnati Royals putiput. 9 bulad 23 demiad, 1945 a mihca, Charlie Beasley, miunduay. (mapatay i 2015 a mihca)
S.PHON: ¶ƒßarr~…æi…ô b…ôasr~…æ…ô nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i sƒßawn…ô…ô, okr~…æaƒßoma, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput. ¶ƒßarr~…æi…ô b…ôasr~…æ…ô i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu ¶in ¶innati *ojar~…æs putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶ƒßarr~…æi…ô b…ôasr~…æ…ô, miunduaj. (mapataj i **** a miƒß ¶a)
S.FORM: Charlie Beasley nalecuhan i Shawnee, Oklahoma, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Charlie Beasley i 1967 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 7 ku uwac atu silsil 74, namapili' tu nu Cincinnati Royals putiput. 9 bulad 23 demiad, 1945 a mihca, Charlie Beasley, miunduay. (mapatay i 2015 a mihca)
